Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two starkly different momentum stories in the top ranks. LINC (rank 1, score 95.2) exhibits exceptional long-term acceleration with a 1533% ten-year return and consistently strong ratio progression across all timeframes, passing 4 of 5 momentum thresholds while trading above all major moving averages—a textbook "strong_buy" signal with minimal volatility risk. In sharp contrast, CF (rank 2, score appears cut off) shows momentum deterioration in the medium term, with its 6-month return of 39.46% significantly underperforming its 3-month return of 62.62%, and its 10-year SPY outperformance of only 56.23% pales against LINC's 1310.26%. The data suggests the momentum-ranker is currently identifying LINC as the dominant secular trend play, while CF appears caught in a transition phase where near-term strength is giving way to longer-term deceleration relative to broader market indices.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
